---
title: "Course Schedule"
format:
    html:
        page-layout: article
tbl-colwidths: [3, 5, 12, 3, 3, 3, 3, 10]
citation-location: document
---

This page contains a schedule of the topics, content, and assignments for the semester.
Note that this schedule will be updated as necessary the semester progresses, with all changes documented here. Readings requiring institutional subscriptions can be accessed through the [Cornell Library](https://www.library.cornell.edu/).

::: column-screen-inset
| Week | Date        | Topic | Slides | Lab | HW | Reading |
:-----:|:------------|:------|:------:|:--:|:---:|:-------:|
| | | ***Module 1: Introduction to Systems Analysis*** | | | | | |
| 1    | Mon, Aug 25 | Welcome to BEE 4750! | [{{< fa sharp presentation-screen >}}](slides/lecture01-1-intro.qmd)  | | [{{< fa sharp file-pen >}}](hw/hw01/hw01.qmd) |  |
|      | Wed, Aug 27 | Lab: Setting up Julia and GitHub | [{{< fa sharp presentation-screen >}}](slides/lecture01-2-lab-setup.qmd)  | [{{< fa sharp laptop >}}](labs/lab01/lab01.qmd) | | |
| 2    | Mon, Sep 01 | **No Class: Labor Day** |  | | | @Liu2007-hy |
|      | Wed, Sep 03 | Introduction to Systems Models | [{{< fa sharp presentation-screen >}}](slides/lecture02-2-systems-intro.qmd)  | | | | |
| 3    | Mon, Sep 08 | System Dynamics: Feedbacks | [{{< fa sharp presentation-screen >}}](slides/lecture03-1-dynamics-feedbacks.qmd)  | |  | @Woodard2019-cz |
|      | Wed, Sep 10 | Equilibria and Bifurcations  | [{{< fa sharp presentation-screen >}}](slides/lecture03-2-equilibria-bifurcations.qmd) | | | |
|  4   | Mon, Sep 15 | Simulation Models | [{{< fa sharp presentation-screen >}}](slides/lecture04-1-simulation.qmd) | | [{{< fa sharp file-pen >}}](hw/hw02/hw02.qmd) | @Oreskes1994-br |
|      | Wed, Sep 17 | Dissolved Oxygen | [{{< fa sharp presentation-screen >}}](slides/lecture04-2-dissolved-oxygen.qmd) | | | |
|  5    | Mon, Sep 22 | More Dissolved Oxygen and Simulation | [{{< fa sharp presentation-screen >}}](slides/lecture05-1-dissolved-oxygen-2.qmd) | | | @Simpson2021-dj |
|   | Wed, Sep 24 | Uncertainty and Monte Carlo |  [{{< fa sharp presentation-screen >}}](slides/lecture05-2-uncertainty-monte-carlo.qmd) | | | |
|  6  | Mon, Sep 29 | Monte Carlo: Why It Works | [{{< fa sharp presentation-screen >}}](slides/lecture06-1-monte-carlo.qmd) | | [{{< fa sharp file-pen >}}](hw/hw03/hw03.qmd) | |
|    | Wed, Oct 01 | Lab: Monte Carlo | | [{{< fa sharp laptop >}}](labs/lab02/lab02.qmd) | | |
|  7   | Mon, Oct 06 | Prescriptive Modeling | [{{< fa sharp presentation-screen >}}](slides/lecture07-1-prescriptive-modeling.qmd) | | | |
|      | Wed, Oct 08 | *Prelim 1*  | | | |  |
|  8  | Mon, Oct 13 | **No Class: Fall Break** |  | |  | |
|   | Wed, Oct 15 | Decision Models and Optimization | [{{< fa sharp presentation-screen >}}](slides/lecture08-2-optimization.qmd) | | | |
|  9 | Mon, Oct 20 | Shadow Prices and Capacity Expansion | [{{< fa sharp presentation-screen >}}](slides/lecture09-1-capacity-expansion.qmd) | |  | | 
|    | Wed, Oct 22 | Lab: Linear Programming |  | [{{< fa sharp laptop >}}](labs/lab02/lab02.qmd) | | |
|  10  | Mon, Oct 27 |  | | | | | 
|     | Wed, Oct 29 |  | | | | |
|  11  | Mon, Nov 03 |  | | |  | | 
|    | Wed, Nov 05 |  | | | | |
| 12    | Mon, Nov 10 |   | | |  | |
|    | Wed, Nov 12 | *Prelim 2* | | | | |
| 13   | Mon, Nov 17 |  | | | | |
|    | Wed, Nov 19 |  | |  | | ||
|  14  | Mon, Nov 24 |  |  |  |    |  | |
|     | Wed, Nov 26 | **No Class: Thanksgiving Break** | | | | |
| 15 | Mon, Dec 01 |  | | | | |
|    | Wed, Dec 03 |  | |  | | |
|  16 | Mon, Dec 08 | | | | |  |
:::
